title: 收口文档事实与采用方治理占位符

sources.reason: R10 documentation fact and executable-example acceptance criteria.
Quick Install, release, lock, and supply-chain claims.
Template security reporting and adopter replacement boundary.

riskAssessment.reason: Initial skeleton; replace with task-specific implementation and review risks.

executionDecision.reason: Documentation and template ownership semantics are implementable without changing runtime behavior.

preReviewWarnings: Do not invent a maintainer identity; keep adopter-owned values explicit placeholders.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: README and distribution documentation state the current public-release, lock, SBOM, and provenance boundaries without overclaiming.
SECURITY.md and CODEOWNERS explicitly identify adopter-owned replacement points and do not present template placeholders as real contacts.
The repository artifact map and executable documentation references remain consistent with the current files and release metadata.
Documentation metadata, full project checks, and AI governance checks pass.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The review still finds documentation claims and template ownership placeholders easy to misread as production-ready repository facts.
constraints: Do not replace adopter-owned contacts or owners with invented identities.
Keep all claims aligned with current release.json and N5 lock/SBOM behavior.
intent.rationale: Explicit template boundaries prevent adopters and reviewers from treating placeholders or local evidence as trusted production configuration.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: A new adopter can identify which SECURITY and CODEOWNERS values must be replaced before production use.
Documentation claims about release and supply-chain evidence match current generated artifacts and checks.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly requested continued remediation through the review-backed cleanup items.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
